examples.title: Power Tree for IoT Sensor Node
examples.description: Design power supply for battery-powered IoT sensor with 3.3V and 1.8V rails.

input.context: Li-ion single cell (3.7V nom, 4.2V max, 3.0V cutoff). Needs 3.3V rail for MCU + radio (150mA peak), 1.8V rail for sensors (20mA). Battery life target: 1 year on 2000mAh cell.

expected_output.rail_table:
| Rail | Voltage | Source | Max Current | Loads | Tag |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| VBAT | 3.0-4.2V | Li-ion cell | 500mA | Regulators | [OBS] |
| 3V3 | 3.3V | Buck (TPS62743) | 300mA | MCU, Radio | [SPEC] |
| 1V8 | 1.8V | LDO from 3V3 | 50mA | Sensors | [GEN] |

examples.title: MCU Pin Assignment for Motor Controller
examples.description: Assign pins for STM32G4 motor controller with 3-phase PWM, encoder, and CAN.

input.context: STM32G474RE. Needs: 6x PWM (3-phase complementary), 1x quadrature encoder, 1x FDCAN, 1x SPI (position sensor), 1x UART (debug), 3x ADC (current sense).

expected_output.pin_table:
| Pin | Function | Peripheral | AF | Notes | Tag |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| PA8 | TIM1_CH1 | PWM Phase A High | AF6 | | [OBS] |
| PA9 | TIM1_CH2 | PWM Phase B High | AF6 | | [OBS] |
| ... | ... | ... | ... | ... | ... |

examples.title: Board Bring-up Debug (Low Energy)
examples.description: Triage a new board that won't power on.

input.context: New PCB revision. No LEDs light up. Input is 5V USB-C. Measured 5.1V at USB connector. 0V at 3.3V rail test point. Buck converter (TPS62A01) getting warm.

expected_output.triage_table:
| Hypothesis | Evidence | Test | Confidence | Tag |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Buck output short | 0V output + warm IC | Measure resistance from 3V3 to GND (expect > 1k) | 0.7 | [DRV] |
| Buck EN pin low | 0V output | Measure EN pin voltage | 0.3 | [SPEC] |
| Solder bridge | Warm IC + 0V output | Visual inspect under microscope | 0.4 | [SPEC] |
expected_output.energy_note: Low energy: triage table + top 3 tests. No full schematic trace. Escalate if short confirmed (need rework).
